<!DOCTYPE html><html><head><title><\/title><link rel="stylesheet" href="/stylesheets/style.css"><script src="https://sdk.cashfree.com/js/v3/cashfree.js"><\/script><\/head><body><script>function openPaymentPage(paymentSessionId) {
  console.log(paymentSessionId, 'paymentSessionId')
    const cashfree = Cashfree({
        mode:"sandbox"
    });
    const checkoutOptions = {
        paymentSessionId: paymentSessionId
    }
    //- const cf = new window.Cashfree(paymentSessionId);
    //- cf.redirect();
    cashfree.checkout(checkoutOptions);
}
openPaymentPage('session_nCVr9N0ZWpVmsvJrZivsama2DV_S3dHIGb-e7YWmC3paWO1yqm7HA0_G3Piko5wgJY5EWcMJYLvNS7Irvtu66MEPk0qJoy3Jj3XRoeYI06FdXo3_Qt2mrt1R');<\/script><\/body><\/html>
